did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a method for skin cancer detection and classification using geometric features based on the ABCD rules (Asymmetry, Border, Color, Diameter) and Total Dermoscopy Score (TDS). The methodology involves image processing steps such as grayscale conversion, region of interest segmentation, and noise removal, followed by feature extraction and rule-based classification. While the paper mentions using a pre-trained MobileNet model in the literature review to discuss related work, the proposed method itself relies on traditional computer vision techniques and heuristic rules rather than AI, machine learning, or deep learning models to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
